modeled_sigma_hw.provenance: canonical 1% FRACTIONAL multiplicative CV: #159 cross-allocation frantic-penguin 3-draw official a10g-small CV 0.962% (dominant), #478 canonicalized to 1% multiplicative. NOT a fire-config measurement -> the value under sensitivity test.
modeled_sigma_hw.transfer_assumption: cross measured on the split-KV/K7 ~485 TPS frontier, NOT int4_mtp_batchinv; #478 establishes sigma_hw is a MULTIPLICATIVE clock/bandwidth draw -> the ~1% FRACTIONAL model transfers across configs (a model assumption, not a direct fire-config measurement). Absolute-TPS (3% at ~160 TPS) is the conservative loose bound.

sign_convention: delta_stock<0 => private FASTER; G1 fail = private >5% SLOWER; R = private/reported = 1 - delta_stock/100, folded with MULTIPLICATIVE sigma_hw (eps ~ N(0, sigma)); sweep scales sigma with FIXED standard-normal draws -> smooth monotone curve.

mult_at_0.90.note: never drops to 0.9 within the swept grid (<= 20.00x) -> robust beyond the swept range; min value 0.90870 at 20.00x

absolute_tps_context.note: P(G1-pass)/R_05 are SCALE-FREE in the official TPS (gate = ratio rule private>=0.95*reported), so the breakdown MULTIPLE is identical at any anchor; only the absolute worst-private TPS scales. At the 130 stress anchor the worst-private margin over the 126.378 bar is razor-thin even at the modeled sigma_hw, so the absolute bar-clear breaks far BEFORE the scale-free G1-reproduction claim does.

deterministic_backstop_check.note: when the FIRE single-draw P(G1-pass) hits 0.95, the joint position survival is still well above 0.95 because the 126.378 live submission (non-spec greedy, deterministic) fails only via sigma_hw, INDEPENDENT of the fire's delta_stock-driven failure -> the backstop is exactly why position survival breaks at a LARGER sigma_hw multiple than the fire-alone claim.

honesty_carry_forward.framing: SENSITIVITY BOUND on a modeling assumption: 'the claim survives sigma_hw up to N x modeled', NOT 'sigma_hw is N x'. No new sigma_hw measurement was taken.
honesty_carry_forward.one_sided_gate: the G1 rule is one-sided (private>=0.95*reported); being faster is not a failure; 64.4% of single draws are >5% FASTER.
honesty_carry_forward.what_held_fixed: the #754 systematic delta_stock bootstrap (seed 730, 50k), the #758 common-mode rho (0.7515 realized) / idiosyncratic SE / all hw + permutation seeds -> the sweep isolates sigma_hw alone.
honesty_carry_forward.absolute_3pct_corner_in_756: the #756 absolute-TPS loose bound (3% at ~160 TPS, ~3x modeled) already gave P(G1-pass)=0.972, consistent with the >=2x breakdown found here.

headline: The G1-safety headline survives sigma_hw mis-specification up to 4.72x the modeled 1% before single-draw P(G1-pass) drops to 0.95 (and 7.24x before 0.90); the joint leaderboard-position survival is even more robust thanks to the deterministic 126.378 backstop. Robust (>= 2x): True.
